# QariAI

> AI-powered Tajweed and Hifz coaching for Quran recitation. QariAI listens to
> your recitation and returns instant, rule-specific Tajweed corrections — no
> login required. Free on Android (iOS coming soon).

QariAI is a mobile app that helps Muslims improve their Quran recitation. It has
two core modes: a **Tajweed mode** that gives feedback on pronunciation and
recitation rules, and a **Hifz mode** for memorization practice. Feedback is
confidence-gated and presented as clear, teacher-style notes rather than a single
opaque score. The app is a practice aid that complements — but does not replace —
a qualified human teacher.

## Key facts
- Platform: Android (Google Play). iOS in development.
- Price: free to download and start; no login required.
- Modes: Tajweed (rule correction) and Hifz (memorization).
- Approach: rule-specific, confidence-gated feedback; no fabricated scores.

## Links
- Home: https://qariai.app/
- Download (Google Play): https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=app.qari.ai
- How it works: https://qariai.app/how-qari-ai-works
- Free Tajweed checker: https://qariai.app/tajweed-mistakes-checker
- Learn common Tajweed mistakes: https://qariai.app/learn/common-tajweed-mistakes
- QariAI vs Tarteel: https://qariai.app/compare/qari-ai-vs-tarteel
- About: https://qariai.app/about
- Contact: salam@qariai.app

## Common questions
- What does QariAI do? It listens to your recitation and gives instant,
  rule-specific Tajweed feedback, with separate Tajweed and Hifz modes.
- Is it free? Yes — free to download and start, no login required.
- Which platforms? Android now; iOS coming soon.
- Is it a replacement for a teacher? No — it is a practice aid that complements a
  qualified human teacher.
